payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Rectangular black frame with a white mat and a faint central sketch or print, wall-mounted and partially cut off in the crop; diagonally occluded by a foreground wooden handrail and white spindles, slightly blurred/low-resolution — estimated ~2.0 m from the camera.
